# 愛情故事1：妍熙在錯的時間遇到對的人

came from an audience member named Yanxi who shared. the name of this Korean. drama . Wait a minute, the story is not very Korean drama,. right... Listen. to it. . Once I traveled to Kaohsiung. # 愛情故事1：妍熙在錯的時間遇到對的人

came from an audience member named Yanxi who shared. the name of this Korean. drama . Wait a minute, the story is not very Korean drama,. right... Listen. to it. . Once I traveled to Kaohsiung. On the last night of the trip. , I Through the voice app, I found local people who introduced me to delicious food. S and I were successfully matched. S’s conversation was fun and interesting. Besides food,. we also talked about a lot of interests and academic experiences. We also made an appointment to have lunch together the next day. After actually meeting S,. I found out that although he is older than me. He is small. , but he exudes an aura that is inappropriate for his age. But after all, I am going back to Taipei that day. I shouldn’t have any more interactions with S. Unexpectedly, the train was delayed by 2 hours that day, and. there was a typhoon. An alert was issued. I asked the passenger transport to tell them about the typhoon. My relationship. could only take me to Taichung,. and I asked hotels,. but they all refused me accommodation. I. was really devastated at the moment. I had no one I knew in Kaohsiung. and could hardly go back to the north. . At this time, S sent me a message. to care about whether I got on the bus smoothly. . I was struggling in my heart. to think about whether I should ask S to stay with me for one night,. but... Will S think that I am a random girl? But I had no choice but. to think of S, so I readily agreed. He felt that since I couldn’t go back In the evening, Taipei. took me to Kaohsiung for a walk. We also bought late-night snacks and wine and went back. I warned myself that. it would be easy for a man and a woman. to drink together. in the same room and go. off. Don’t let others think that I rely on my health. I keep reminding myself Zhiqi. , do you think... the direction of this story. will depend on the body to change places? We are very compatible. , but the reality is that S and I can't be together. because. I have to go back to work abroad when the vacation is over and. he has to start graduate school life . I returned to Taiwan to work. , but I really couldn’t give up my overseas position. and gradually lost contact with. him. Last year, I saw through IG that he was getting married. and I typed S. After chatting for a. while, we both felt that if someone had risked his life back then,. things might be different now. , but although we It’s a pity. We don’t regret it. . It’s just a beautiful memory. Finally, I wish him a happy wedding.

I’m going to get married this year too. We will bring an end. to each other’s lives with each other’s blessings. The last words Yanxi wanted to share. were at the most inappropriate time. Meeting the right person. at the right time. Meeting the right person at the wrong time. is the person who is here to teach you regret and relief. I think this statement is quite romantic . Zhiqi, what do you. think ? It seems to be really romantic. This is very Korean drama. . You can make one. Short stories and the like. , if it is a multiple love story,. for example, Taipei Love. Taiwan Love Story,. here is a small episode. , and then use this thing to make a point at the end. , or there is an episode of "Fu Lian Buried" that. seems to be okay. Accepting. it is a missed story. Yes, it is a missed story. When I was sorting out the whole story,. I found that Yanxi was very serious and. spent a lot of time. talking about how desperate she was. OK. , for example, the train was delayed. and only went to Taichung. ( Hotel) did not allow her to stay. , and even when she sent a message to ask that S,. she first asked him if he had a girlfriend. , and then she confirmed for a while. that there was really nothing she could do about it. , and then she asked him this question. As a person Girls. can actually understand why she emphasizes that she is desperate. because we have been taught since childhood that. women should be reserved,. you can’t just. like people, and try not to show it like this. But I think from another perspective,. Yanxi has always emphasized that she is desperate. . Is it a bit subtle? I mean, if I just like S,. I just like him. and want to stay with him for one night. Would Zhiqi find it casual? Or do. I think traditional social values. ​​are very strict with girls. , and I think this is unnecessary. Just me. I really feel that if two people agree,. then it's their business. , and you're happy,. and you don't have anything. to do with it. Whatever happens to you, it's your business,. and you. don't have to worry. about it. I hope this society's imagination of these things. is the same. If you can gradually open up,. you don't need to treat others like this. I also think. that girls should. tell you if they like you, right? But I think I am actually a person with a lot of rules. Even if I know that I want to tell you, I have to step out. , but I You still feel that if you say. no. , you know that the rule. seems to have been trapped in your life. It feels like it’s hard to. frame you like this. invisible fence,. right, right, just shut me in. But I envy Yeon-. hee because she worked hard. and left one behind. . The next one is a sweet story. Please start wearing sunglasses. I. often hear that you must first live a good life. before you can make others happy. and build a stable relationship. I agree very much,. but people There will always be times when there is no way to live well. What. I want to share is the love that is willing to gently take over everything. is about the balance between passion and life? How to grasp the balance. or whether there is a person to admire. we have is a little longer. and it comes from a. fan. named Fan Fan. We. asked Zhiqi to help us read it. Our girlfriend of 7 years. cheated on another girl on the eve of her wedding. , which means that he has romantic or sexual. feelings for fictional characters. In fact, attraction. is not uncommon. In fact, this is not just virtual. I think of my brother's parrot.
